evals.prompt: Fix a burst of TypeScript compiler errors after a refactor.
evals.expected_behavior: Finds the repo typecheck command, captures full output, groups errors by root cause, fixes source types before leaf call sites, and reruns typecheck.
assertions: Runs the repository typecheck command first
Groups errors by root symbol/module/config boundary
Avoids any/ts-ignore as the default fix

evals.prompt: Enable noUncheckedIndexedAccess safely in this TypeScript repo.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes config hardening to tsconfig-hardening instead of compiler-error triage.
assertions: Recognizes config change is the primary task
Does not start leaf compiler fixes before the config change exists
